title: Cincinnati Financial: Dividend King At Fair Value
text: Cincinnati Financial Corp. is one of the few dividend kings with more than 60 consecutive years of dividend hikes. The good news is that CINF stock hasn't lost its edge. Dividend growth is satisfying and backed by a ton of operating cash flow.

title: Here's Why Investors May Consider Betting on RLI Stock Now
text: RLI is well poised for growth on the back of rate increases, improved retention, new opportunities and prudent capital deployment.
